name: Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper - KCXJ08A
Cream butter with brown sugar, add flour and nuts. Blend to make a mixture that resembles coarse crumbs. Reserve 1 cup for topping. Press remaining mixture into greased 8 x 8 pan. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes or until lightly brown. Blend sugar with cream cheese until smooth. Add remaining ingredients and mix well. Spread mixture over hot baked crust and sprinkle with the reserved crumb mixture. Bake at 350°F about 25 minutes. Cut into squares and refrigerate.
